title: cheirostylis tabiyahanensis
intro: Cheirostylis tabiyahanensis is a species of orchid that is native to the Philippines. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cheirostylis tabiyahanensis include its potential to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, Cheirostylis tabiyahanensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, where the leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to create a decoction that is consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
